name: CTR Investments & Consulting, Inc.
summary: CTR Investments & Consulting, Inc. provides information technology services and products used by customers in the financial, private, government, and health care sectors. It specializes in identity information and data assurance; visitor management; and security technologies, including hardware and software solutions for electronic visitor management. The company's products include BioKey ID identity card systems; DataSafe products/services set for capturing and securing electronic documents and information; and a line of biometric facial recognition solutions. CTR Investments & Consulting is based in Pasadena, Maryland.
